penalties.description: Cut path shows visible deviation from the marked circle boundaries.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on task completion and detected line deviation penalties. Minor timing difference (110s vs 111s) was averaged. Claude's penalty deduction of 10 points was used over GPT's 4 points as it aligns with standard FLS scoring where line deviations typically carry 10-point penalties.

disagreements.rationale: Minor 1-second difference likely due to frame interpretation variance; averaged for consensus.
Standard FLS scoring typically assigns 10 points per line deviation penalty, making Claude's deduction more consistent with official rubric.
